findings.location: Table of contents (source lines 4-20) / sections s5–s16
findings.description: The knowledge file covers only 4 sections (s1–s4) but the source file's table of contents lists 16 sections. The following 12 sections are entirely absent from the knowledge file: how_to_numbering_sequence, using_ThreadContext, using_TestDataParser, using_junit_annotation, using_transactions, using_ohter_class, how_to_assert_property_from_excel, tips_test_data, how_to_express_empty_line, how_to_change_master_data, how_to_change_test_data_dir, how_to_convert_test_data. The automated pre-check also flagged this: 'Section count 4 < source headings 9'.
findings.source_evidence: Source TOC lists 16 ref entries; only 4 sections (how_to_get_data_from_excel through how_to_fix_date) appear in the knowledge file.
